removePosition.title: Remove position
removePosition.message: Remove this position from your portfolio?

removeWatchlist.title: Remove watchlist item
removeWatchlist.message: Remove this item from your watchlist?

popBubble.title: Pop bubble
popBubble.message: Pop this bubble and remove the position?

detail.insufficient_correlation_data: Insufficient historical data for correlation analysis

profile.daten_apple_verknuepft: Your data is securely linked to your Apple ID.

alerts.title: Price Alert
alerts.pushReady: Stored locally and ready for push notifications later.

rebalancing.title: REBALANCING
rebalancing.subtitle: Concentration and diversification signals
rebalancing.empty: No active positions to analyze yet.
rebalancing.positionConcentration: %@ represents %@%% of your portfolio. Consider reducing concentration.
rebalancing.technologyConcentration: Your portfolio is %@%% technology-weighted. Consider adding other sectors.
rebalancing.noMajorIssues: No major concentration signals detected right now.

assetClassImbalance.stocks: You have %@%% in stocks. Consider balancing with other asset classes.
assetClassImbalance.etfs: You have %@%% in ETFs. Review whether this matches your target mix.
assetClassImbalance.crypto: You have %@%% in crypto. Consider diversification.

advice.noActivePositionsBody: Add active positions to unlock portfolio coaching.

largest.title: LARGEST POSITION
largest.warning: %@ represents %@%% of your portfolio. Consider reducing concentration.
largest.healthy: %@ is your largest position, but concentration looks controlled.

assetClass.title: ASSET CLASS BALANCE
assetClass.balanced: Your asset class mix looks reasonably balanced.
assetClass.concentrated: %@ represents %@%% of your portfolio. Consider adding another asset class.
assetClass.stablecoins: %@%% is cash-like crypto. Stablecoins are excluded from volatility advice.

stablecoin.title: CASH-LIKE CRYPTO
stablecoin.none: No cash-like crypto position is currently in the active portfolio.
stablecoin.body: %@%% is cash-like crypto. It stays in allocation, but is ignored for volatility-based advice.

correlation.title: DIVERSIFICATION
correlation.none: No strong correlation signal is available yet.
correlation.positive: %@ and %@ currently move similarly. That can reduce diversification.
correlation.negative: %@ and %@ tend to move apart, which may help diversification.

size.title: Bubble size
size.body: Shows portfolio weight. Larger bubbles represent larger positions.

color.title: Bubble color
color.body: Shows performance. Green means positive return, red means negative return, neutral means flat.

ghost.title: Ghost bubbles
ghost.body: Watchlist items are shown as ghost bubbles. They do not affect portfolio value or analytics.

stablecoins.title: Stablecoins
stablecoins.body: Stablecoins are treated as cash-like crypto and excluded from volatility-based advice.

pearson.title: Pearson Correlation
pearson.shortDescription: Measures how strongly two assets move together.
pearson.explanation: Correlation shows whether two assets tend to move in the same direction, independently, or in opposite directions.

simulation.title: Interactive Simulation
simulation.subtitle: Drag the slider to simulate returns correlation
simulation.label: Correlation Coefficient (r)

perfectPositive.description: Perfect positive correlation. Assets move exactly together.

strongPositive.title: +0.7 to +0.9
strongPositive.description: Strong positive correlation. Assets generally move in the same direction.

perfectNegative.description: Perfect inverse correlation. When one asset rises, the other falls.

disclaimer.title: Important
disclaimer.text: Correlation does not imply causation. Two assets moving similarly does not necessarily mean one causes the movement of the other.

bubbles.mergedBubblesText: Highly related assets can be grouped into one cluster bubble. Merging is visual only and does not change your portfolio.
